Name: Seahorse People
Description: Premier couriers and messengers, operating a de facto intelligence network and exclusive brokers for the 'Devil's Choice' mercenary unit.
Economic Niche: Information brokerage, courier services, and mercenary contracts

Steeds.Terrestrial: Nimble mountain goats of unknown origin

Services.Courier: Delivery of messages with an ironclad guarantee of security
Services.Intelligence Network: Primary source of news and gossip along the river systems
Services.Mercenary Brokerage: Exclusive brokers for the 'Devil's Choice' mercenary unit
